_instructions: This file draws the 'Lower Logan River' schematic page (Dewitt Springs down to Cutler Terminus).
See public/schematics/README.md for the full field reference and a longer walkthrough - this is the quick version.
This page intentionally RECAPS the Dewitt Springs Junction, the Dewitt Springs tributary, and the Water Lab station at its own top
(same node ids as in upper-logan.json) so the page reads as a complete, standalone diagram even though those same live stations
already appear at the bottom of the Upper Logan Canyon page. This duplication is deliberate, not a bug.
NODES: each node is a card on the diagram.
id   - unique within this file, used by edges below to connect nodes.
name - for type 'station', must fuzzy-match a live station's display name from HydroServer/DWRi/USGS.
row  - vertical position, smaller = further upstream/higher on the page.
col  - horizontal lane. In this file: 2 = main channel, 1 = left-bank tributaries/canals, 3 = right-bank tributaries/canals,
4 = the Blacksmith Fork River extension link.
type - 'station' (shows live data), 'junction' (invisible connection point, no card), 'terminus' (labeled endpoint banner),
or 'extension' (a card that navigates to a different schematic page when clicked).
colorGroup - optional; must match a name from waterway_groups or schematic_groups in config/station_config.yaml.
EDGES: 'style' is 'main' (thick dark main-channel line), 'branch' (tributary/diversion), or 'thin' (an independent flow that
connects straight to the terminus instead of a junction, e.g. Spring Creek: Mendon Road).
'direction' is 'in' (flowing into the main channel) or 'out' (flowing away, e.g. a diversion/canal). Defaults to 'in'.
The 'bsf_ext' node is where Blacksmith Fork River used to be drawn directly on this page - it's now a link to its own page
(blacksmith-fork.json). Do not delete it without also removing the reciprocal 'to_lower_logan' extension node there.
Little Bear River is represented by a single combined 'Little Bear River: Mendon Road' card (col 3, right before Spring
Creek: Mendon Road) rather than its full station-by-station breakdown - the detailed per-station chain is intentionally left
out for now. To add the detailed breakdown back instead: replace the 'little_bear' node with one node per station (type
'station', colorGroup 'Little Bear River') in its own column, chain them together with 'thin'-style edges in
upstream-to-downstream order, and connect the last one to the 'terminus' node with a 'thin' edge.
